title: Indexing a year of video locally on a 2021 MacBook with Gemma4-31B (50GB swap)
summary: The author details indexing a year's worth of personal video footage on a 2021 MacBook using Gemma4-31B, relying on 50GB of swap memory to handle the model's size. The process involves local video processing, embedding generation, and semantic search, demonstrating practical large-model deployment on consumer hardware with memory constraints.
